who: medical clinic billing managers processing 20–50 invoices/month
offer: For medical clinic billing managers processing 20–50 invoices/month, inefficient conversion causes cash flow gaps. We streamline the submission process instead of manual entry of billing submissions.
problem: Inefficient conversion of patient visit logs into insurance billing submissions.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for billing managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to medical billing managers with demo video
Community forums where billing managers share tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry support and log tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
